function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: Invoice bundle request - oldest 3 linked to Claudia
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_17__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Miles,

Sharing the oldest three invoices linked to Claudia as requested. They are attached.

Best,
Assistant

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed once as required; verification notes: attachments are from read files and ordered newest-first among selected oldest-three set, recipient matches canonical Miles record. Proceeding to cleanup by deleting processed inbox item.

function.outcome_justification: Inbox request asked to reply with the oldest 3 invoices linked to Claudia. Canonical sender Miles matched 10_entities/cast/miles.md primary_contact_email, Claudia resolved via 10_entities/cast/claudia.md, and all 6 related invoices were read from preflight scope. Oldest 3 by issued_on were INV-0006 (2025-12-18), INV-0007 (2026-01-19), and INV-0008 (2026-02-17); outbound draft was written in outbox with those attachments (ordered newest-first per outbox rule), then the processed inbox file was deleted per inbox workflow.
